mapper.insert: INSERT INTO chat_message (user_id, session_id, role, content) VALUES (#{userId}, #{sessionId}, #{role}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, session_id, role, content, created_at FROM chat_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY created_at ASC

SELECT session_id AS sessionId, MAX(content) AS lastMessage, MAX(created_at) AS lastTime, COUNT(*) AS messageCount FROM chat_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND role = 'user' GROUP BY session_id ORDER BY lastTime DESC
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM chat_message WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND session_id = #{sessionId}
